# TASK-021: Health Check System

**Milestone**: V0.1.0 - Beta Version
**Priority**: High
**Estimated Time**: 6 hours
**Dependencies**: V0.0.5 (User Experience Optimization)

## Description
Implement a comprehensive health check system for monitoring task orchestrator, agents, and Bitable integration health. Provide real-time status reporting and automatic recovery mechanisms.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Design health check architecture
- [ ] Implement agent health monitoring
- [ ] Create Bitable connectivity checks
- [ ] Add system resource monitoring
- [ ] Implement automatic recovery mechanisms
- [ ] Create health status API endpoints
- [ ] Unit tests with 80%+ coverage
- [ ] Integration tests with monitoring

## Implementation Plan
1. Design health check architecture
2. Implement agent health monitoring
3. Create Bitable connectivity checks
4. Add system resource monitoring
5. Implement automatic recovery
6. Create API endpoints
7. Write comprehensive tests
8. Document health check system

## Technical Details
- Monitor agent status and performance
- Check Bitable API connectivity
- Monitor system resources (CPU, memory, disk)
- Implement automatic recovery for failed components
- Provide real-time health status API
